scripts.postinstall: npm run postinstall-js && npm run postinstall-css
scripts.postinstall-js: cp node_modules/reveal.js/dist/reveal.mjs js/reveal.js ; cp node_modules/reveal.js/dist/plugin/markdown.mjs js/markdown.js ; cp node_modules/reveal.js/dist/plugin/notes.mjs js/notes.js ; cp node_modules/fudgel/dist/fudgel.mjs js/fudgel.js
